Describe the sequence of actions and visible changes involving the drummers from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black screen transitions to a person holding a white object; at 2s, a group begins playing snare drums on a field; at 4s, the central drummer's shirt text becomes visible; at 8s, the boy actively strikes the drum with sticks; at 16s, the line of drummers continues playing near water coolers.

question: Identify specific background objects and text details that appear at different times during the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, white snare drums with the Pearl logo appear in a line; at 4s, a scoreboard becomes visible in the far background right; at 8s, text reading SCOTS TIGERS displays on the scoreboard; at 10s, palm trees are seen against a hillside; at 16s, blue and white water coolers sit on the ground near the drummers.
